name: useScript
description: Hook that manages a script with onLoad, onError, and removeOnUnmount functionalities

source.source: * @param {string} src The source of the script

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: The options of the script extends from attributes script tag

source.source: * @param {UseScriptOptions} [options] The options of the script extends from attributes script tag

tokens.name: [options]
tokens.description: The options of the script extends from attributes script tag

parameters.name: options.removeOnUnmount
parameters.description: Whether to remove the script on unmount

source.source: * @param {boolean} [options.removeOnUnmount=true] Whether to remove the script on unmount

tokens.name: [options.removeOnUnmount=true]
tokens.description: Whether to remove the script on unmount

parameters.name: options.async
parameters.description: Whether to load the script asynchronously

source.source: * @param {boolean} [options.async=true] Whether to load the script asynchronously

tokens.name: [options.async=true]
tokens.description: Whether to load the script asynchronously
